projects.title: Peer Talk
projects.description: A web app for peer-to-peer text and voice communication, featuring collaborative apps that can be used whilst in a call.

projects.title: Review Charter
projects.description: A Next.js application for viewing user data from the GraphQL AniList API, in charts created with Chart.js.

projects.title: React Weather
projects.description: A weather application built with React and the OpenWeather API.

projects.title: React Pomodoro
projects.description: A pomodoro timer built with React and React Redux.

projects.title: React Calculator
projects.description: A calculator application built with React.

projects.title: Astrocats
projects.description: An asteroids clone built with the Unity Game Engine, featuring new additions to the gameplay.

projects.title: YouTube Alternative Switch
projects.description: A Firefox extension for quickly switching videos between YouTube, Piped, Invidious and Chat Replay.

projects.title: MPV YouTube Search
projects.description: An mpv (media player) script that uses the mpv console input to search YouTube or YouTube Music and add the results to the mpv playlist.
